notes: HL7 FHIR R4 RESTful API. The fhir adaptor is generic (post/get/create/createTransactionBundle/getClaim) over any resource type; this subset models the resources seen in the adaptor examples and common OpenFn FHIR usage: Patient, Observation, Encounter, Claim, and transaction Bundle. Resource schemas are focused subsets of the full FHIR StructureDefinitions. Server base is the public HAPI R4 test server; real deployments vary.
